steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: The left side is an important new initiative, a noun phrase. The right side is the Timeline of African American Music, another noun phrase that names the specific initiative.

steps.title: Apply the colon rule
steps.content:
A colon introduces a name, title, or elaboration. The phrase initiative: the Timeline of African American Music correctly uses the colon to show that Timeline names the initiative.

The alternatives violate punctuation rules: two adjacent nouns without a connector, a period that fragments the sentence, and a semicolon that misuses rules for separating noun phrases.

B is correct.
